message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for CountLeadingZeros

Adds 21 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Zero values (clz(0) = bit_width)
- One values (clz(1) = bit_width - 1)
- Powers of two
- All ones patterns (clz(-1) = 0)
- i64 boundaries (MAX, MIN)
- Specific bit patterns (high nibble, alternating, sparse)
- Negative numbers (two's complement)
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Mathematical properties (floor_log2 relationship, bit width)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
